Protein families: Anaerobic coproporphyrinogen-III oxidase family, ChuW/HutW subfamily
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the anaerobic coproporphyrinogen-III oxidase family. ChuW/HutW subfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=2 reduced [flavodoxin] + heme b + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = anaerobilin + 2 oxidized [flavodoxin] + Fe(2+) + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:15429, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10622, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10623, ChEBI:CHEBI:17319, ChEBI:CHEBI:29033, ChEBI:CHEBI:57618, ChEBI:CHEBI:57844, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:58210, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:60344, ChEBI:CHEBI:136517; EC=2.1.1.342; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:27791000};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in heme degradation and iron utilization under anaerobic conditions. Catalyzes a radical-mediated mechanism facilitating iron liberation and the production of the tetrapyrrole product anaerobilin. Can use heme, mesoheme and deuteroheme as substrates. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:27791000}.
